---
title: "🏠 Absent from Chronic"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---
🏠   

**Predictors of Work Absenteeism Associated with Chronic Conditions Among Canadian Workers**

Marc-Andre Blanchette, Oleksandr Koval, Andriy Koval


## Outcome in Focus

![Distribution split profile of absenteeism days highlighting outcome shape differences.](../../../analysis/eda-71/prints/g23_chronic_vs_other_only_raw_split_distribution.png){fig-alt="Outcome distribution split profile" width="90%"}

## Welcome

This site presents the project response to the Project Proposal for the study on predictors of work absenteeism among Canadian workers with chronic conditions.

The Project section contains the full Project Proposal document used as the governing brief for this analysis.

The Pipeline section documents how source data were processed into analysis-ready artifacts and includes both INPUT and CACHE manifests.

The Data Primer section provides variable traceability and univariate profile outputs. The Analysis section provides outcome and domain-specific reports (Exposure, Predisposing, Facilitating, Needs).

## Pipeline

![Pipeline architecture used to process pooled CCHS cycles into analysis outputs.](images/pipeline-architecture.jpg){fig-alt="Pipeline architecture" width="90%"}

For detailed page-level mapping from the Project Proposal to site content, see [Site Map](site-map.qmd).
